parsed.generic_mechanism: When blocks share the same causal model, examples, promises, and sequence, they produce the same persuasive effect; comparative advantage requires a substantive difference in intervention.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A causal loop recasts urges as relief from prior-use discomfort, while conditioning and later dissatisfaction challenge pleasure and reward. The freedom frame persists, though sweeping claims, fear appeals, and repetition weaken credibility and accumulation.
paraphrased_evidence.B: A causal loop recasts urges as relief from prior-use discomfort, while conditioning and later dissatisfaction challenge pleasure and reward. The freedom frame persists, though sweeping claims, fear appeals, and repetition weaken credibility and accumulation.
